# Mehul Jariwala — mehuljari.in

> Full-Stack Engineer & AI/ML Specialist with 8+ years of experience building production software.

## About

Mehul Jariwala is a full-stack engineer and AI/ML specialist based in Bangalore, India. He has 8+ years of experience shipping production software across industries including finance, retail, healthcare, and legal tech. He specializes in building LLM-powered agents, RAG systems, and scalable full-stack applications.

## Current Role

Lead Full Stack + Gen AI/ML Engineer (Founding) at FasterOutcomes — building a Legal AI platform using LangChain, LangGraph, Temporal, and vector databases.

## Previous Experience

- Staff Software Engineer at IBM Labs — built AI-powered analytics platform processing millions of events
- Senior Software Engineer at Publicis Sapient — scaled Tesco's online grocery platform across UK, Central Europe, and Asia Pacific
- Senior Software Engineer (Founding Team) at Fitbots — led front-end architecture for OKR SaaS platform

## Companies Worked With

IBM, Amazon, Tesco, Walmart, Flipkart, T-Mobile, Tata Neu, Publicis Sapient

## Technical Expertise

- AI/ML: RAG, AI Agents, LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, AutoGen, CrewAI, Pinecone, Hugging Face, TensorFlow
- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Svelte, Vue.js, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Java, NestJS, GraphQL
- Infrastructure: AWS, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, Kafka, ElasticSearch
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, DynamoDB, CosmosDB, Pinecone

## Education

- Master of Computer Applications (MCA) — Jain University, Bangalore (Gold Medalist, 9.1/10.0 GPA)
- Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) — Bhagwan Mahavir University, Surat (8.9/10.0 GPA)

## Blog Topics

Mehul writes about AI engineering, system design, RAG systems, AI agents, microservices, TypeScript patterns, and real-world case studies from building production AI systems.

## Popular Articles

- "Why Your RAG System Sucks (And How to Fix It)" — 15.8K readers
- "How I Replaced 50 Hours of Manual Work with a Single AI Agent" — 12.4K readers
- "System Design: How We Built a Real-Time Analytics Platform at IBM" — 8.7K readers
- "Scaling Tesco's Online Grocery to Millions of Users Across 3 Continents" — 6.3K readers
- "AI Agent Development with CrewAI and AutoGen" — 5.1K readers
